messages.author: Wei Chen (Product)
messages.text: I know this is on a lot of people's minds - is the Atlas launch still happening in August? Sales keeps asking me and I don't have a firm answer to give them.

thread_replies.author: Priya Nair (Sales)
thread_replies.text: Yeah we have customers asking us directly, need something to tell them.

thread_replies.author: Devon Choi (Marketing)
thread_replies.text: Marketing has launch assets scheduled around the August date, need to know if that changes.

thread_replies.author: Sofia Ramos (Support)
thread_replies.text: Support is staffing up for the launch week, timing matters a lot for us.

thread_replies.author: Trevor James (Ops)
thread_replies.text: Ops needs the real date to finalize shipping partner contracts.

thread_replies.author: Marcus Bell (Engineering)
thread_replies.text: From eng side, the LIDAR sensor supplier has been a mess lately so I wouldn't be shocked if it slipped.

thread_replies.author: Ha-eun Park (Finance)
thread_replies.text: Finance is also watching this for revenue forecasting.

thread_replies.author: Wei Chen (Product)
thread_replies.text: Will post here as soon as I hear anything official from leadership.

thread_replies.author: Leah Fischer (People)
thread_replies.text: Recruiting has been telling candidates about the August launch too, would be good to align messaging.

thread_replies.author: Dana Osei (IT)
thread_replies.text: IT needs the date to plan the war room support rotation.

messages.author: Sam Torres (Engineering)
messages.text: Can someone review PR #482 when they get a chance - just a small CSS fix on the settings page.

thread_replies.author: Marcus Bell (Engineering)
thread_replies.text: On it, will look after standup.
